title: CEconomy
description: Adds a fully-functioning economy! Currency, Shops, Wallets, Banks, and more!
body: Calemi's Economy adds a fully-functioning economy system! The form of currency is obtained by mining Raritanium Ore, which can be found deep in caves. Once mined, Coins can be crafted (one for one). You can store your Coins in an item (Wallet) or block (Bank). Trading Posts can be set up to sell and buy items from other players! Trading Posts can be fully automated by hopper-ing in items for stock.
